# Setup Checklist вЂ” Ready for @dev (Story 1.1)

**Generated:** 02/03/2026
**Generated By:** @architect (Aria)
**Status:** Architecture APPROVED вЂ” Ready for Implementation Day 1

---

## вњ… Architecture Decisions Finalized

### Stack Selection (CONFIRMED)
- вњ… **Frontend:** Next.js 15 + React + Tailwind CSS + React Hook Form
- вњ… **Backend:** Fastify + TypeScript
- вњ… **Database:** Supabase (PostgreSQL managed + Auth + RLS)
- вњ… **Email:** Resend
- вњ… **Calendar:** Google Calendar API
- вњ… **Deploy:** Vercel (frontend) + Vercel Edge (backend)
- вњ… **Testing:** Vitest + Playwright

### Database: Supabase (Not Generic PostgreSQL)
- вњ… Using Supabase Auth (not NextAuth.js)
- вњ… RLS policies at database level
- вњ… Migrations via `supabase/migrations/` directory
- вњ… Local dev with `supabase start`

### Documents Generated
- вњ… `docs/architecture/project-analysis.md` вЂ” Full project analysis
- вњ… `docs/architecture/recommended-approach.md` вЂ” Tech stack + schema + phases
- вњ… `docs/architecture/SETUP-CHECKLIST.md` вЂ” This file

---

## рџљЂ Day 1 Tasks for @dev (Before Starting Story 1.1)

### 1. Create Project Structure
```bash
# Create monorepo
mkdir genialidade-app
cd genialidade-app

# Initialize pnpm workspace
pnpm init -y
# Edit package.json, add:
# "workspaces": ["packages/*"]

# Create packages
mkdir -p packages/backend
mkdir -p packages/frontend
```

### 2. Backend Setup (Fastify + TypeScript)
```bash
cd packages/backend

# Initialize
npm init -y

# Install dependencies
npm install fastify typescript @types/node ts-node dotenv cors
npm install --save-dev vitest @vitest/ui

# Create structure
mkdir -p src/modules/shared src/middleware src/routes __tests__
mkdir -p prisma/migrations

# Create TypeScript config
cat > tsconfig.json << 'EOF'
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "module": "commonjs",
    "lib": ["ES2020"],
    "outDir": "./dist",
    "rootDir": "./src",
    "strict": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "declarationMap": true,
    "sourceMap": true,
    "moduleResolution": "node"
  },
  "include": ["src"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist", "__tests__"]
}
EOF

# Create .env.example
cat > .env.example << 'EOF'
# Supabase
SUPABASE_URL=https://xxx.supabase.co
SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=eyJ...
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=eyJ...

# App
NODE_ENV=development
PORT=3001
LOG_LEVEL=debug

# Email (Resend)
RESEND_API_KEY=re_...

# Google Calendar
GOOGLE_CALENDAR_ID=xxx@group.calendar.google.com
GOOGLE_CALENDAR_KEY=...
EOF
```

### 3. Frontend Setup (Next.js)
```bash
cd packages/frontend

# Create Next.js app
npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --no-git

# Install additional dependencies
npm install @supabase/supabase-js react-hook-form zod zustand

# Create .env.example
cat > .env.example << 'EOF'
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=https://xxx.supabase.co
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=eyJ...
EOF
```

### 4. Supabase Project Creation
```bash
# Install Supabase CLI
npm install -g supabase

# Login to Supabase
supabase login

# Create project (or use existing)
supabase projects create --name genialidade

# Link local project
supabase link --project-ref [PROJECT_ID]

# Pull remote schema
supabase db pull

# Start local Supabase
supabase start

# Access Supabase Studio (local)
# Open http://localhost:54323 in browser
```

### 5. Database Initialization (Story 1.1)
```bash
# Create initial migration file
supabase migration new initial

# This creates: supabase/migrations/{timestamp}_initial.sql
# Fill with schema from docs/architecture/recommended-approach.md

# Apply migration locally
supabase db push

# Verify tables created
supabase db list

# Test connection with script (will be created in Story 1.1)
node scripts/test-db.js
```

### 6. Environment Setup
```bash
# In root package.json, add scripts:
{
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "pnpm -r dev",
    "build": "pnpm -r build",
    "lint": "pnpm -r lint",
    "test": "pnpm -r test",
    "db:push": "supabase db push",
    "db:status": "supabase status"
  }
}

# Copy .env.example files to .env.local (NEVER commit .env.local)
cp packages/backend/.env.example packages/backend/.env.local
cp packages/frontend/.env.example packages/frontend/.env.local

# Fill in actual credentials in .env.local files
```

### 7. Git Setup
```bash
# Root .gitignore
cat > .gitignore << 'EOF'
node_modules/
dist/
.env.local
.env.*.local
.supabase/
*.db
.DS_Store
.vercel
EOF

# Initialize git
git init
git add .
git commit -m "chore: initialize monorepo with Next.js + Fastify"
```

---

## рџ“‹ Story 1.1 Concrete Steps

Story 1.1 = **Setup Database + Schema DiagnГіstico**

### AC 1: Supabase Connected
- [ ] Supabase project created
- [ ] `SUPABASE_URL` + `SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` in `.env.local`
- [ ] Connection tested: `supabase status` shows вњ…

### AC 2: Table `clientes`
- [ ] Table created with fields: id, email, nome, status, data_inscricao
- [ ] `email` is UNIQUE
- [ ] `status` is VARCHAR (not ENUM for flexibility)

### AC 3: Table `questoes`
- [ ] Table created with 28 rows pre-loaded
- [ ] Fields: id, numero (1-28), dimensao, texto, tipo
- [ ] QuestГµes sourced from `landing-page-formulario.md`

### AC 4: Table `respostas`
- [ ] Table created with FK to `clientes` + `questoes`
- [ ] UNIQUE constraint on (cliente_id, questao_id)

### AC 5: Table `scores`
- [ ] Fields: id, cliente_id, desalinhamento, ruido, vazamento, maturidade, total
- [ ] `total` is GENERATED ALWAYS AS (sum of 4 dimensions) STORED
- [ ] UNIQUE constraint on cliente_id

### AC 6: Table `decisoes`
- [ ] Fields: id, cliente_id, score_id, hipotese_preliminar, aprovado, data_analise
- [ ] UNIQUE constraint on cliente_id

### AC 7: RLS Policies
- [ ] Row Level Security ENABLED on all tables
- [ ] Clients see only their own data (via user_id)
- [ ] Backend can see all (via service role key)

### AC 8: Migration File
- [ ] `supabase/migrations/{timestamp}_initial.sql` created
- [ ] Contains full schema (all 6 tables + indices + RLS)
- [ ] Fully documented with comments

### AC 9: Test Script
- [ ] `scripts/test-db.js` validates all tables
- [ ] Returns вњ… for all 6 tables or clear error message
- [ ] Runs with `node scripts/test-db.js`

### AC 10: Documentation
- [ ] `docs/database-schema.md` created
- [ ] Includes ER diagram (ASCII or link to diagram)
- [ ] Lists all tables, fields, constraints, relationships
- [ ] Explains RLS policies

## рџ“Љ Project Checklist (Validation Points)

### Before @dev Starts Story 1.1
- [ ] Monorepo created (packages/backend + packages/frontend)
- [ ] Backend: TypeScript + Fastify configured
- [ ] Frontend: Next.js + Supabase JS client installed
- [ ] Supabase project created + linked
- [ ] `.env.local` files created with placeholders
- [ ] All dependencies installed (`pnpm install`)
- [ ] Root scripts working (`pnpm dev`, `pnpm build`)

### During Story 1.1 Execution
- [ ] Database schema created from recommended-approach.md
- [ ] Migration file created: `supabase/migrations/{ts}_initial.sql`
- [ ] 28 questГµes pre-loaded into `questoes` table
- [ ] RLS policies written for all tables
- [ ] Test script validates connectivity

### After Story 1.1 Completion
- [ ] All 10 ACs passing вњ…
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes (no TS errors)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `test-db.js` runs successfully
- [ ] Documentation: `database-schema.md` complete
- [ ] Story 1.1 marked as вњ… Done
- [ ] Ready for Story 1.2 (Form component)

## вљ пёЏ Critical Path

**Story 1.1 is the ABSOLUTE BLOCKER.** All other stories depend on it:

```
1.1 Database (2 days) в†ђ BLOCKER
  в”њв†’ 1.2 Form (can start once 1.1 done)
  в”њв†’ 1.3 Scoring
  в”њв†’ 1.4 Email
  в””в†’ All other stories...
```

**If 1.1 slips:** Entire timeline slips. **Start here immediately.**

## рџ“… Timeline Expectation

| Phase | Days | What |

| **Day 3** | 1 | Test script + documentation + validation |
